title: Onboarding
loadingDescription: Applying your defaults and restoring the shortest path into the app.
hourlyRateTitle: How much do you earn per hour?

profile.title: What's your name?
profile.description: These details personalize the app and your reports.

workplace.title: What work are you setting up?
workplace.description: Use your business, contract, client group, or main job name.
workplace.name: Business or work name
workplace.startDateHint: We selected the first day of the current month. You can change it.

payment.title: How do you usually get paid?
payment.description: Choose the model you use most often. You can add other services later.

hourly.title: Hourly
hourly.description: Earnings are calculated from worked hours.

fixed.title: Fixed salary
fixed.description: A recurring salary with a monthly hour target.

perUnit.title: Per unit
perUnit.description: Charge for each room, item, mile, or other unit.

fixedAmount.title: Per job
fixedAmount.description: Enter the agreed amount when each job is completed.

timeEntry.title: How do you record your work?
timeEntry.description: Alveryn will only enable tools that fit your payment model.

timer.title: Check-in and manual entry
timer.description: Start and stop work, or add hours later.

manual.title: Manual entry only
manual.description: Enter your work intervals after the shift.

job.title: Record completed work
job.description: Add the quantity or agreed job amount when the work is complete.

balance.title: Do you need an hour balance?
balance.description: Choose whether hours above or below your target carry between months.

no.title: No
no.description: See worked totals without a carried balance.

notNeeded.title: No hour balance needed
notNeeded.description: Your earnings are based on completed units or jobs, not a monthly hour target.

workType.title: What service do you provide most often?
workType.description: This becomes your first work type. You can add more later.
workType.name: Service or work type
workType.colorHint: Alveryn assigns a neutral color automatically. Colors help identify activities in the calendar and can be changed later.

errors.name: Enter your first and last name.
errors.workplace: Enter your business or work name and start date.
errors.workType: Enter a service or work type name.
errors.perUnit: Enter a unit name and a rate greater than zero.
errors.preferences: Your account preferences are not available yet.

trackingSetup.title: What do you want to track?
trackingSetup.description: Choose what matters for each employment. Alveryn will keep the interface focused and hide irrelevant values.
trackingSetup.chooseForEmployment: Choose how this employment should work.

TIME.title: Time tracking
TIME.description: Track worked hours, check-in and check-out. Money stays out of the way.

EARNINGS.title: Earnings tracking
EARNINGS.description: Track hours, quantities or completed work together with earnings.

trackingSetup.changeLater: You can change this later in Settings → Employment.
